mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lifestyle_result(lifestyleresultno, memberno, result, rdate) VALUES (lifestyle_result_seq.nextval, #{memberno}, #{result}, sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT lifestyleresultno, memberno, result, rdate FROM lifestyle_result ORDER BY rdate DESC
SELECT lifestyleresultno, memberno, result, rdate FROM lifestyle_result WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY rdate DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE lifestyle_result SET result = #{result}, rdate = sysdate WHERE lifestyleresultno = #{lifestyleresultno}
